tools.name: ARCNN
tools.subtitle: Neural Network Verification via Abstract Interpretation
tools.description: ARCNN is an open-source tool for formally verifying robustness properties of deep neural networks. It uses abstract interpretation to compute certified bounds on network outputs, supporting a wide range of network architectures and activation functions.

benchmarks.name: CPS Verification Benchmark Suite
benchmarks.description: A curated set of hybrid system verification benchmarks spanning automotive, avionics, and medical device domains. Includes both safety and liveness properties.
